sentences.english: Listen to a conversation between a student and a faculty member.
sentences.korean: 학생과 교수 사이의 대화를 들어보세요.

sentences.english: Hi, Professor Okafor. I got an internship offer from a marketing firm downtown and I was wondering if I can get academic credit for it.
sentences.korean: 안녕하세요, 오카포 교수님. 시내 마케팅 회사에서 인턴십 제안을 받았는데, 학점을 받을 수 있는지 궁금해서요.

sentences.english: Congratulations! That's exciting news. What kind of work would you be doing?
sentences.korean: 축하해! 흥미로운 소식이구나. 어떤 일을 하게 되니?

sentences.english: Market research mainly — running surveys, analyzing consumer data, helping with campaign strategy. It's 20 hours a week for the summer.
sentences.korean: 주로 시장 조사요 — 설문 진행, 소비자 데이터 분석, 캠페인 전략 지원. 여름 동안 주 20시간이에요.

sentences.english: That sounds like very relevant work for your major. Yes, in principle, you can earn credit.
sentences.korean: 전공에 매우 관련된 일 같구나. 네, 원칙적으로 학점을 받을 수 있어.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Student Visits Professor About Research Paper

sentences.english: But there are a few conditions. Let me walk you through them.
sentences.korean: 하지만 몇 가지 조건이 있어. 하나씩 설명해줄게.

sentences.english: First, the internship has to be approved in advance by the department.
sentences.korean: 먼저, 인턴십은 학과로부터 사전 승인을 받아야 해.

sentences.english: Second, you'd need to enroll in our Internship Practicum course — that's Marketing 490.
sentences.korean: 둘째, 인턴십 실습 과목에 등록해야 해 — 마케팅 490이야.

sentences.english: At 20 hours a week for a full summer, you'd probably qualify for the full three credits.
sentences.korean: 여름 내내 주 20시간이면 아마 3학점 전부 자격이 될 거야.

sentences.english: And what does that course require? Is there coursework on top of the internship?
sentences.korean: 그 과목은 뭘 요구하나요? 인턴십 외에 과제도 있나요?

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Student Visits Professor About Research Paper

sentences.english: There is some reflection work. You'd submit biweekly journal entries describing what you're learning and how it connects to your coursework.
sentences.korean: 성찰 과제가 좀 있어. 배우고 있는 것과 수업 내용의 연결을 기술한 격주 일지를 제출해야 해.

sentences.english: At the end of the summer, you'd write a 10-page capstone reflection paper.
sentences.korean: 여름 끝에 10페이지 종합 성찰 논문을 써야 해.

sentences.english: What grade system does it use? Is it pass/fail?
sentences.korean: 어떤 성적 체계를 사용하나요? 합격/불합격인가요?

sentences.english: You can choose either pass/fail or a letter grade.
sentences.korean: 합격/불합격이나 등급 성적 중 선택할 수 있어.

sentences.english: Most students choose pass/fail to reduce pressure, but if you're doing a strong internship with solid reflections, a letter grade could boost your GPA.
sentences.korean: 대부분 학생들은 부담을 줄이려고 합격/불합격을 선택해. 하지만 좋은 인턴십에 충실한 성찰이면, 등급 성적이 GPA를 올릴 수 있어.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Student Visits Professor About Research Paper

sentences.english: Is there anything I need to do right now to get the process started?
sentences.korean: 과정을 시작하려면 지금 뭘 해야 하나요?

sentences.english: Bring me the internship offer letter and I'll sign off on the approval form.
sentences.korean: 인턴십 제안서를 가져오면 승인서에 서명해줄게.

sentences.english: Then go to the Registrar's Office to officially enroll in Marketing 490. Do that before the add/drop deadline — it's in two weeks.
sentences.korean: 그 다음 학적과에 가서 마케팅 490에 공식 등록해. 수강 추가/취소 마감 전에 — 2주 안이야.

sentences.english: Great. I'll bring the letter tomorrow. Thank you so much!
sentences.korean: 좋아요. 내일 편지 가져올게요. 정말 감사합니다!

sentences.english: My pleasure. It sounds like a wonderful opportunity. Make the most of it.
sentences.korean: 천만에. 멋진 기회 같구나. 최대한 활용해.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Student Visits Professor About Research Paper
